general_inquiry.question: Find the second derivative of the following function: $\sqrt[3]{7 x^5+9}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The second derivative of the function \(\sqrt[3]{7x^5 + 9}\) is:

\[
\frac{d^2}{dx^2} \left( \sqrt[3]{7x^5 + 9} \right) = \frac{35x^2(14x^5-1)}{(7x^5+9)^{5/3}}
\]
